user_request: What are our current rate limits?

messages.content: What are our current rate limits?

Your current rate limits are set to 1,000 requests per minute for the standard tier and 10,000 requests per minute for the premium tier. Burst allowance is 150% of the base limit for up to 30 seconds.

findings.explanation: Specific configuration numbers with no source data.
findings.evidence_proving_hallucination: No tool calls, no context blocks.
